Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate a list of open ended questions that clarify the process described

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should cover missing details decision criteria roles timing exceptions etc Avoid SQL or implementation Focus on conceptual understanding

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible areas

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Who initiates the process Landlord contacts regional office But what triggers a landlord to contact Any prior marketing

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Documentation What happens if documents are missing Coordinator requests updates How long does that take What if landlord refuses

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Property details recording Who ensures accuracy Any validation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Property manager assignment Decision criteria listed How are conflicts resolved What if no manager available

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Introductory call What if landlord is unavailable What if disagreements arise

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Inspector photographer Scheduling Who pays What if inspector finds major issues Landlords responsibility

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Marketing Who creates content How long does listing take What if market changes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Tenant screening How many applicants What if no suitable tenant What about waiting list

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lease finalization Who drafts Legal review What about e signatures

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality checks Compliance officer financial analyst IT What if they find issues Rework

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Exceptions Special insurance custom clauses How are these handled Approval needed

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Communication Tracked in CRM but who is responsible for updates

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Timeline Overall duration Milestones

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Handoffs Between regional office coordinator property manager etc

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Scalability How does company handle multiple properties simultaneously

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Feedback loop Any post onboarding review

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Generate 10 15 questions Make them open ended not yes no
